findings.description: Amends entry references consolidate_cascade.py as removed from ADR-044 §10.3, but the comment acknowledges the script is owned by ADR-042.
findings.evidence: Audit fix I6 clarification: consolidate_cascade.py is owned by ADR-042, not ADR-044 §10.3. Editorial note, not a functional contradiction.
findings.recommendation: No action required; commentary is explicit and self-aware. This is a documentation clarification, not a rule contradiction.

notes.methodology: Scanned all three ADRs for the 8 contradiction classes per ADR-042 §28.1. Used grep/read to inspect frontmatter (supersedes, agent_editable, governs, excludes), prose for rule conflicts, section references, and tool consistency.
notes.validation_summary: No critical findings. All ADRs are internally consistent. §13 (trailer required) vs §25 (Tier 1 exempt) is consistent: §25.2 and §25.4 tier matrix clearly show Assisted-by is NOT required for Tier 1 humans. No workflow cycles, no schema mismatches, no undefined cross-references to non-existent sections.
